flow_points: United Arab Emirates scored 44 runs for 2 wickets in the Powerplay.
C Bosch delivered a crucial bowling spell, taking 3 wickets for only 13 runs from 4 overs.
His spell sustained defensive pressure throughout, evidenced by an impact score of 133.91.
GF Linde also contributed with 1 wicket for 17 runs from 4 overs.
South Africa started their chase strongly, scoring 56 runs for 2 wickets in their Powerplay.
South Africa's Powerplay run rate was 9.33, indicating a positive start to their chase.
AK Markram anchored South Africa's innings.
Markram contributed 22.8% of the team's total runs.
South Africa secured the victory by 6 wickets.
